data.description: The data object to display. Can contain nested objects, arrays, and various data types. DataView automatically detects and formats fields based on their type (contacts, companies, files, dates, etc.).

formConfig.description: Configuration object defining how to structure and display the data. Allows customization of sections, field ordering, labels, and component hints for type detection.

component.description: Component type, typically 'section' for the root.

form.description: Array of field configurations or nested sections.

key.description: The data field key to display. Supports dot notation for nested fields (e.g., 'user.name').

title.description: Custom label for the field. If not provided, the key will be formatted automatically.

component.description: Component hint for type detection (e.g., 'selector', 'date_selector', 'contact_selector_number_required'). Helps DataView determine the correct rendering type.

sectionCards.description: Whether to display sections as cards with borders and padding. Set to false for a more compact, borderless layout.

disableCrmLinks.description: Disable hyperlinks for contact and company fields. When true, contacts and companies will display as plain text with icons instead of clickable links.

s3GetPolicyRequestId.description: Request ID for S3 file download policy. Required when displaying file fields that need secure download URLs.
